name: Symptoms delayed 5 years after quitting, still claimable in Ogden?
description: Yes, Utah allows up to 8 years for latent lung diseases.

mainEntity.name: Symptoms delayed 5 years after quitting, still claimable in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah allows up to 8 years for latent lung diseases.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, occupational disease statutes cover latency up to 8 years in Utah.** Black lung, silicosis qualify[6]. Key factors: Last exposure date; diagnosis proof; no break in causation. Courts extend for progressives. File upon doctor confirmation. Attorney argues tolling.
